title: Scheduled Road Works on Sungai Besi Highway (2024)
snippet: Besraya and LLM are conducting scheduled road maintenance on the Sungai Besi Highway from August 1 to December 31, 2024. Phased nightly lane closures (10PM-6AM) are expected to cause periodic disruptions.

title: MRT Putrajaya Line Service Disruption (Taman Naga Emas)
snippet: MRT Putrajaya Line service was disrupted in February 2024 between Taman Naga Emas and Sungai Besi stations due to a trespasser incident, affecting thousands of early morning commuters.

title: Severe Gridlock at Sungai Besi Toll (July 2024)
snippet: Massive traffic jams were reported at the Sungai Besi toll plaza on July 29, 2024, due to unannounced police roadblocks, causing significant delays for commuters entering Kuala Lumpur.

title: DBKL: Jalan Sungai Besi Upgrade (Sept 2023 - Sept 2024)
snippet: Kuala Lumpur City Hall (DBKL) is executing a major infrastructure upgrade for Jalan Sungai Besi. The project involves phased road closures and bridge construction, scheduled to continue through September 2024.
